title: Payment API Authorization Failure Runbook
summary: Operational runbook for triaging Payment API authorization failures, 5xx spikes, database lock waits, and connection pool exhaustion.

view.value:
Payment API Authorization Failure Runbook

Check Splunk for payment-api 5xx rate, p95 latency, DB_POOL_TIMEOUT, and CIRCUIT_OPEN events.

If database pool saturation is confirmed, pause related migrations, increase pool limits only within approved guardrails, and keep rollback ready until error rate remains below 5 percent for 15 minutes.

storage.value:

title: INC09811 Payment API Database Lock Wait Post Incident Review
summary: Previous incident review for Payment API failures caused by a database migration lock during customer transaction volume.

view.value:
INC09811 Review

Root cause was a schema migration holding locks on payment_authorizations during peak payment volume.

Recommended prevention: block migrations during settlement windows, pre-check lock wait thresholds, and define rollback criteria before approval.

storage.value:

title: Payments Ledger Known Issue - Connection Pool Saturation
summary: Known issue describing how payments-ledger connection pool saturation appears in logs and what mitigations are permitted.

view.value:
Connection Pool Saturation

Symptoms include DB_POOL_TIMEOUT, rising p95 latency, and payment-api circuit breaker events.

Temporary pool increases are permitted only after confirming database CPU remains below 70 percent and lock waits are falling.

storage.value:

title: Morning Operations Briefing Checklist
summary: Checklist for overnight incident summary, unresolved risk, service health, and handover actions.

view.value:
Morning Operations Briefing Checklist

  • Summarise Sev-1 and Sev-2 incidents from the overnight window.
  • Call out mitigated incidents that still need monitoring.
  • Review Splunk alerts, Teams handover notes, and CAB risks for the day.

title: CAB Risk Review Standard
summary: CAB review standard for change conflicts, approval status, rollback criteria, and operational risk scoring.

view.value:
CAB Risk Review Standard

High-risk changes require confirmed approvals, rollback criteria, and checks for overlapping incidents or settlement windows.

Database migrations touching payment_authorizations must not run during peak settlement activity unless explicitly approved by Payments SRE and Database Engineering.

title: Payment Settlement Change Freeze Windows
summary: Payment settlement windows that should be treated as restricted periods for database migrations and high-risk deployments.

view.value:
Payment Settlement Change Freeze Windows

Restricted windows: 01:30-02:30 UTC and 16:00-17:30 UTC on business days.

CHG-8842 overlaps the 01:30-02:30 UTC settlement window and should be rescheduled or escalated for explicit CAB approval.
